examples.title: Pseudocode: Calculating CPU Utilization
examples.description: Calculating CPU utilization based on busy and total time
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CalculateCpuUtilization
INPUT: busyTime, totalTime
OUTPUT: cpuUtilization

BEGIN
 cpuUtilization = (busyTime / totalTime) * 100
 RETURN cpuUtilization
END
examples.explanation: Calculates CPU utilization as a percentage by dividing busy time by total time and multiplying by 100

examples.title: Python: Calculating CPU Utilization
examples.description: Calculating CPU utilization based on busy and total time
examples.code:
def calculate_cpu_utilization(busy_time, total_time):
 cpu_utilization = (busy_time / total_time) * 100
 return cpu_utilization

# Example usage:
busy_time = 850 # in milliseconds
total_time = 1000 # in milliseconds
print(calculate_cpu_utilization(busy_time, total_time))
examples.explanation: Calculates CPU utilization as a percentage by dividing busy time by total time and multiplying by 100

examples.title: C: Calculating Turnaround Time
examples.description: Calculating turnaround time based on submission and completion time
examples.explanation: Calculates turnaround time by subtracting submission time from completion time
